title: stenotaenia elbursensis
intro: Stenotaenia elbursensis, also known as Elburz Stenotaenia, is a species of plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to Iran. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Stenotaenia elbursensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Stenotaenia elbursensis are traditionally used in folk medicine, often in the form of decoctions or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
